fre_definitions.FIRM-001: Blackstone: FRE = management fees + transaction/monitoring fees - base comp - G&A. Includes fee-related performance revenues.
fre_definitions.FIRM-002: Apollo: FRE = management fees - management fee comp and non-comp expenses. Excludes transaction fees.
fre_definitions.FIRM-003: KKR: FRE = total management fees + transaction fees + monitoring fees + fee-related performance revenues - comp - other operating expenses.
fre_definitions.FIRM-004: Brookfield AM: FRE = fee revenues (mgmt + incentive distributions) - operating expenses. Includes carried interest on permanent capital vehicles.
fre_definitions.FIRM-005: Carlyle: FRE = fund management fees + portfolio advisory fees - comp (cash) - G&A.
fre_definitions.FIRM-006: Ares: FRE = management fees + other fees - comp - G&A. Includes fee-related performance revenues.
fre_definitions.FIRM-007: TPG: FRE = management fees + monitoring fees + transaction fees - operating expenses.
fre_definitions.FIRM-008: Blue Owl: FRE = management fees + admin fees - comp - G&A. High permanent capital mix = stable FRE.
fre_definitions.FIRM-009: StepStone: FRE = management and advisory fees - comp - G&A. March fiscal year-end.
fre_definitions.FIRM-010: CVC: Reports 'Management Fee EBITDA' as closest FRE equivalent. EUR-denominated.
fre_definitions.FIRM-011: General Atlantic: Limited public disclosure. FRE estimated from available data.
fre_definitions.FIRM-012: Partners Group: Reports 'Management Fees and Other Revenues' minus 'Personnel Expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'. CHF-denominated.
fre_definitions.FIRM-013: ARES Capital / Golub: FRE from management fees on credit AUM.
fre_definitions.FIRM-014: Hamilton Lane: FRE = management and advisory fees - total expenses (ex-performance fee comp).
fre_definitions.FIRM-015: EQT: Reports 'EBITDA' from fund management segment as FRE proxy. SEK-denominated.
fre_definitions.FIRM-016: Bridgepoint: Reports 'Fee-Related Earnings' aligned to US convention. EUR-denominated.
fre_definitions.FIRM-017: ICG: Reports 'Fund Management Company Profit' as FRE equivalent. GBP-denominated.
fre_definitions.FIRM-018: Petershill (Goldman Sachs): FRE = partner manager fee-related earnings attributable to Petershill stakes.
fre_definitions.FIRM-019: PAX (Patria): FRE = Fee-Related Earnings as reported. USD-denominated but BRL fee base.
fre_definitions.FIRM-022: Eurazeo: Reports 'Fee-Related Earnings' from asset management segment. EUR-denominated.
fre_definitions.FIRM-023: Ridgepost (P10): FRE = Fee-Related Revenues - Fee-Related Expenses.
fre_definitions.FIRM-024: Antin: Reports 'FRE' directly. ~98% management fee revenue. EUR-denominated.
